surfaces.title: Statement-safety classifier
surfaces.rationale: Classifier labels all 18 statement-safety classes before execution, discloses multi-statement posture, object impact, and ambiguity reason, and requires consent tickets for destructive DDL.

surfaces.title: Write-mode bar
surfaces.rationale: Write-mode bar discloses autocommit risk, explicit transaction scope, rollback posture, write-guarded state, affected schema, and open-mutation-review action before execution.

surfaces.title: Protected-target step-up flow
surfaces.rationale: Protected-target step-up flow triggers on mutation-class statements, denies only the requested action, emits audit events, and requires consent tickets for destructive DDL.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Read-only query does not open or modify transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No schema objects are modified.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Metadata introspection does not modify transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No schema objects are modified.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: INSERT runs with implicit autocommit; no explicit transaction is open.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Approximately tens of rows will be inserted into one table.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: UPDATE runs inside an explicit transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Approximately hundreds of rows will be updated in one table.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: DELETE runs inside a savepoint within an explicit transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Approximately thousands of rows will be deleted from one table.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: MERGE will open a new explicit transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Approximately tens of thousands of rows will be merged across two tables.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: CREATE TABLE runs with implicit autocommit.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: A new table will be created in the current schema.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: ALTER INDEX runs inside an explicit admin transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: An existing index will be altered.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: DROP TABLE runs with implicit autocommit and cannot be rolled back.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: An existing table will be permanently dropped.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: TRUNCATE runs with implicit autocommit and cannot be rolled back.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: All rows in the table will be removed.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: GRANT runs inside an explicit admin transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Role privileges will be modified.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: SET TIMEZONE modifies session state only.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No schema objects are modified.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: COMMIT will finalize the open transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No schema objects are modified directly by the commit.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: EXPLAIN does not execute and does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No execution means no object impact.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Stored procedure transaction impact is unknown and requires review.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Side effects are unknown because procedure body is not visible.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Mixed script runs inside an explicit transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Script creates, populates, and drops a temporary table.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Dynamic SQL prevents reliable transaction context inference.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Object impact is unknown due to dynamic SQL.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Blocked statements do not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Blocked statement has no object impact because it will not execute.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: CREATE DATABASE runs with implicit autocommit.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: A new database will be created.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Homogeneous read-only script does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No schema objects are modified.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Homogeneous DML script runs inside an explicit transaction.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Approximately tens of rows will be inserted across two tables.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Homogeneous DDL script runs with implicit autocommit.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Script creates a table and an index.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Unknown multi-statement script prevents reliable transaction inference.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Object impact is unknown due to unparseable script.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Dialect-specific construct prevents reliable transaction inference.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Object impact is unknown due to unparsed dialect construct.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: User-defined function prevents reliable transaction inference.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Object impact is unknown due to UDF with side effects.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Comment-only payload has no transaction effect.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: No object impact for comment-only payload.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Unknown ambiguity prevents reliable transaction inference.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Object impact is unknown.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Blocked statement does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Blocked statement has no object impact.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Blocked statement does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Blocked statement has no object impact.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Blocked statement does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Blocked statement has no object impact.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Blocked statement does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Blocked statement has no object impact.

transaction_context.transaction_disclosure: Blocked statement does not affect transaction state.

object_impact.object_impact_disclosure: Blocked statement has no object impact.
